title: ZA Royale
description: A Battle/Ranked System for the cobblemon mod based off the ZA System from Pokemon Legends ZA
body:
ZA Royale adds a configurable ranked battle system for Cobblemon servers. Players can challenge each other to ranked battles, gain or lose points based on results, climb ranks, earn configurable battle rewards, and appear on a server leaderboard.

Players can use commands or the in-game GUI to view their rank, points, leaderboard placement, win/loss record, streak, active restrictions, banned Pokemon, and rewards.

Server owners can configure rank thresholds, point changes, rewards, banned Pokemon, restrictions, shiny boost values, and chat flare formatting through the config files.
